title: Krallet
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''krallet''' was an extinct [[Species/Legends|species]] of serpent from the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Duro/Legends|Duro]].

"Krallet" was also a popular name for a male [[Duros/Legends|Duros]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-08-XX -->''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]'' {{1stm}}
